entity.summary: Singapore-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange offering spot and futures markets.
entity.notes: CoinGecko identifies a 2021 establishment year and Singapore registration. The first-party site exposes current markets, spot, and futures surfaces.

evidence.title: CoinUp.io exchange profile and markets
